recommendations.title: Don't Kill It
recommendations.overview: Demon hunter Jebediah Huntley teams up with an FBI agent to battle a supernatural force in the southern state of Mississippi.

recommendations.title: Big Ass Spider!
recommendations.overview: When a giant alien spider escapes from a military lab and rampages across the city of Los Angeles, it is up to one clever exterminator and his security guard sidekick to kill the creature before the entire city is destroyed.

recommendations.title: Lavalantula
recommendations.overview: Giant lava breathing tarantulas – Lavalantulas – erupt out of ancient volcanos in the Santa Monica Mountains, raining death and destruction upon Los Angeles. With the City of Angels on the verge of incineration, only a washed up ‘90s action hero acto

recommendations.title: Tales of Halloween
recommendations.overview: Ten stories from horror's top directors. Ghosts, ghouls, monsters, and the devil delight in terrorizing unsuspecting residents of a suburban neighborhood on Halloween night. This creepy anthology combines classic Halloween tales with the stuff of nig
recommendations.director: Axelle Carolyn, Paul Solet, Mike Mendez, Lucky McKee, Ryan Schifrin, John Skipp, Neil Marshall, Darren Lynn Bousman, Adam Gierasch, Andrew Kasch, Dave Parker

recommendations.title: Z
recommendations.overview: A family find themselves terrorized by their eight-year-old son's imaginary friend.

recommendations.title: Even Lambs Have Teeth
recommendations.overview: Two young women terrorized by a group of small town psychos seek revenge on their tormentors.

recommendations.title: Weapons
recommendations.overview: When all but one child from the same class mysteriously vanish on the same night at exactly the same time, a community is left questioning who or what is behind their disappearance.

recommendations.title: Frenzy
recommendations.overview: London is terrorized by a vicious sex killer known as The Necktie Murderer. Following the brutal slaying of his ex-wife, down-on-his-luck Richard Blaney is suspected by the police of being the killer. He goes on the run, determined to prove his innoc

recommendations.title: Death Note: The Last Name
recommendations.overview: In the second installment of the Death Note film franchise, Light Yagami meets a second Kira and faithful follower Misa Amane and her Shinigami named Rem. Light attempts to defeat L along with Teru Mikami (a Kira follower) and Kiyomi Takada (another

recommendations.title: Post Mortem
recommendations.overview: A post mortem photographer and a little girl confront ghosts in a haunted village after the First World War.
